name: Jacek Miloszewski
bio: Jacek is a software engineer at Form3 who has spent the last five years under the hood of high-stakes financial systems. From architecting TCH-RTP real-time payments to building out multi-cloud platform infrastructure, he specializes in the parts of the stack that simply cannot fail. He's at his happiest when things get weird at the networking layer. Known for a "detective" approach to systems engineering, Jacek loves the deep-dive investigations required to untangle connectivity and performance puzzles in complex, mission-critical environments.
